name: Discord Thread Autoname
description: Automatically renames Discord threads after agent replies.

baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL, for example https://api.openai.com/v1.

apiKey.description: OpenAI-compatible API key. Prefer apiKeyEnv for shared configs.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable that contains the API key.

model.description: Chat Completions model used to generate thread titles.

prompt.description: Prompt template. Use {conversation} where recent messages should be inserted.

tokenInterval.description: Token increase required before renaming an already-renamed thread.

maxInputChars.description: Maximum recent conversation characters sent to the title model.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for the title model.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature for the title model.
